turns.content: What brings you in today?
These headaches, doc. They keep coming back and won't go away. Sometimes I get dizzy too.
When did this start?
A few months back, I guess. Could be two or three. They just keep coming.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
Right here, at the back of my head. Feels like someone's squeezing it tight.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No. No fever. Just the headaches and the dizzy spells.
What medications are you currently taking?
Just some aspirin for the pain, every now and then. And I take a blood pressure pill, but I don't remember the name.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Yeah, I got high blood pressure. And my back's been acting up for years, but that's from work.
Are you allergic to any medications?
Not that I know of. Never had a problem with any pills before.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
Just the aspirin, like I said. Sometimes I put a cold cloth on my head when it gets real bad. Lying down helps a little with the dizziness.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Bending down or lifting stuff at work makes it worse. Lying still helps some. Loud noise too - that's rough.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
It's making work tough. Hard to focus lifting boxes when I'm dizzy all the time. Makes me short with people too.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
I smoke about a pack a day. Drink beer on weekends, maybe three or four.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
I don't think so. My dad had high blood pressure too, but he never complained about headaches like these.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
Nah, I've had headaches before, but never like this. These just won't quit. And the dizziness is new.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
Yeah, I guess so. Just tell me what's wrong so I can get on with things.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically, it's about a 6. Head's pounding and I feel off balance. Emotionally... I'd say a 7. It's got me on edge.
Do you have any questions for me?
Just tell me if it's something bad. And if there's a pill to make it stop.
What do you think might be going on?
I don't know, that's why I'm here. I just need it to stop so I can get back to work.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
I think that's everything. Unless you need to know how my neck feels stiff sometimes when I wake up. But that's probably nothing.
